an9.13:1.1:
Then the Venerable Mahākoṭṭhita approached the Venerable Sāriputta and exchanged greetings with him. When they had concluded their greetings and cordial talk, he sat down to one side and said to the Venerable Sāriputta:
"Now, friend Sāriputta, is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced in this life become kamma
I am to experience in a future life’?"
an9.13:2.2:
"Then is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced in a future life become kamma
I am to experience in this life’?"
an9.13:3.2:
"Now, friend Sāriputta, is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced as pleasant become kamma
I am to experience as painful?’"
"Certainly not, friend."
an9.13:3.3:
"Then is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced as painful become kamma
I am to experience as pleasant ‘?"
an9.13:4.2:
"Now, friend Sāriputta, is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let my kamma
is to be experienced when it has matured become kamma
I am to experience while it has not matured’?"
an9.13:5.2:
"Then is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced while it has not matured become kamma
I am to experience when it has matured’?"
an9.13:5.4:
"Now, friend Sāriputta, is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced copiously become kamma
I am to experience just slightly’?"
an9.13:5.6:
"Then
is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced just slightly become kamma
I am to experience copiously’?"
an9.13:5.8:
"Now, friend Sāriputta, is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is to be experienced become kamma
I am not to experience’?"
an9.13:5.10:
"Then is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: ‘Let kamma
is not to be experienced become kamma
I am to experience’?"
an9.13:6.2:
"Friend Sāriputta, when you are asked: ‘Now, friend Sāriputta, is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: "Let kamma
is to be experienced in this life become kamma
I am to experience in a future life"?’ you say: ‘Certainly not, friend.’
an9.13:7.2:
And when you are asked: ‘Then is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: "Let kamma
is to be experienced in a future life become kamma
I am to experience in this life"?’ you say: ‘Certainly not, friend.’ …
… When you are asked: ‘Now, friend Sāriputta, is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: "Let kamma
is to be experienced become kamma
I am not to experience"?’ you say: ‘Certainly not, friend.’ And when you are asked: ‘Then is the spiritual life lived under the Blessed One for this purpose: "Let kamma
is not to be experienced become kamma
I am to experience"?’ you say: ‘Certainly not, friend.’ Then for what purpose does one live the spiritual life under the Blessed One?"
an9.13:8.2: "One lives the spiritual life under the Blessed One, friend, for the purpose of knowing, seeing, attaining, realizing, and penetrating what one has not known, seen, attained, realized, and penetrated."
an9.13:8.3: "But, friend, what is it that one has not known, seen, attained, realized, and penetrated?"
an9.13:9.2:
"‘This is suffering,’ friend, is what one has not known, seen, attained, realized, and penetrated, and it is for the purpose of knowing, seeing, attaining, realizing, and penetrating this that one lives the spiritual life under the Blessed One.
‘This is the origin of suffering’ … ‘This is the cessation of suffering’ … ‘This is the way leading to the cessation of suffering’ is what one has not known, seen, attained, realized, and penetrated, and it is for the purpose of knowing, seeing, attaining, realizing, and penetrating this that one lives the spiritual life under the Blessed One. This, friend, is what one has not known, seen, attained, realized, and penetrated, and it is for the purpose of knowing, seeing, attaining, realizing, and penetrating this that one lives the spiritual life under the Blessed One."
